items.name: hip4-format
items.title: HIP-4 Formatting Utilities
items.description: Price, USDH, countdown, and period formatters for HIP-4 prediction market data.

items.name: market-card
items.title: Market Card
items.description: Display card for HIP-4 prediction markets with 4 variants: recurring (Up/Down), event (Yes/No), named-binary (custom sides), and question (multi-outcome).

items.name: live-price-chart
items.title: Live Price Chart
items.description: Real-time ticking price chart for prediction markets. Shows asset price history with 1-second updates, target price reference line, and asset-branded color. Polymarket-style.

items.name: orderbook
items.title: Orderbook
items.description: Dual-pane L2 orderbook with color-coded depth bars, spread display, user order highlighting, and click-to-set-price interaction.

items.name: recent-trades
items.title: Recent Trades
items.description: Scrollable trade feed showing recent market trades with color-coded buy/sell sides, monospace prices, and timestamps.

items.name: trade-form
items.title: Trade Form
items.description: Complete prediction market trade form with market/limit modes, order summary (payout, profit, slippage), tick-size validation, min-shares enforcement, and builder fee support.

items.name: market-stats
items.title: Market Stats
items.description: Compact inline stats display showing volume, trade count, and unique trader count with icons.

items.name: probability-bar
items.title: Probability Bar
items.description: Two-tone horizontal probability bar showing Yes/No (or custom) side probabilities with labels and smooth transitions.

items.name: countdown
items.title: Countdown
items.description: Segmented countdown timer with urgency colors. Shows DAYS/HRS/MINS/SECS with red (<1h), amber (<6h), normal states. Includes text variant.

items.name: position-card
items.title: Position Card
items.description: Displays a user's position with shares, current value, average entry, and unrealized P&L with color coding.

items.name: use-hip4-client
items.title: useHIP4Client
items.description: Creates and caches an @purrdict/hip4 client with WebSocket subscription support. Manages lifecycle and cleanup on unmount.

items.name: use-hip4-signer
items.title: useHIP4Signer
items.description: Adapts any wagmi wallet (MetaMask, WalletConnect, Privy, etc.) to the HIP-4 SDK signer interface. Returns null when disconnected.

items.name: use-markets
items.title: useMarkets
items.description: Discovers active HIP-4 markets and subscribes to live mid prices via WebSocket. Returns stable markets array with useMemo to prevent downstream rerenders.

items.name: use-orderbook
items.title: useOrderbook
items.description: Subscribes to the L2 orderbook for a prediction market coin. Returns bids, asks, spread, and mid price with live WebSocket updates.

items.name: use-portfolio
items.title: usePortfolio
items.description: Fetches USDH balance, outcome token positions, and open orders for a wallet address. Stable return object with useCallback for refresh.

items.name: use-trade
items.title: useTrade
items.description: Place and cancel HIP-4 prediction market orders. Handles builder fee attachment, tick alignment, and order signing via the SDK.

items.name: use-min-shares
items.title: useMinShares
items.description: Computes the minimum order size for a prediction market coin based on mark price from spotMetaAndAssetCtxs.
